headline: AbbVie Stock Rockets 17% With 5-Day Winning Streak
summary: AbbVie (ABBV) - a pharmaceutical company developing and selling specialized therapies - hit a 5-day winning streak, with cumulative gains over this period amounting to 17%. The company's market cap has surged by about $65 Bil over the last 5 days and currently stands at $448 Bil.

headline: Harbour BioMed Appoints Dr. Lloyd Klickstein as Scientific Advisor for Immunology
summary: Harbour BioMed (the "Company"; HKEX: 02142), a global biopharmaceutical company committed to the discovery and development of novel antibody therapeutics in immunology, oncology and other disease areas, today announced the appointment of Dr. Lloyd Klickstein as Scientific Advisor for Immunology.
